title: GLM-5.2 + Z-Code (Ultra Mode - Free Tier): FABLE LEVEL PERFORMANCE!
summary: A tutorial demonstrating GLM-5.2 integrated with Z-Code for coding tasks, using KingMode, planning skills, verification workflows, and MCPs. The setup aims to achieve frontier-model-level coding performance on free tier by combining structured planning, agent-style skills, and systematic verification processes.
writeup: The video walks through pairing GLM-5.2 with Z-Code for coding tasks, configured through KingMode and run in an Ultra Mode free tier. It covers structured planning skills, agent-style skills, verification workflows, and Model Context Protocol integrations as the mechanisms meant to push coding output toward frontier-model quality. The central claim is that combining long-horizon planning, systematic verification, and test-time compute can lift a free-tier setup to that performance level.
